time_feature_policy: Time-of-day and day-of-week sine/cosine covariates are known at prediction time and may be supplied for input and forecast horizons.
normalization_policy: Per-sensor z-score statistics are loaded from the training-only scaler created in Cell 8.
native_missing_value_policy: Values marked missing by the native observation mask are represented as 0.0 after normalization and are always accompanied by a separate mask.
loss_aggregation_policy: Masked loss is normalized by the total number of valid target entries in the batch, never by the number of windows.
metric_aggregation_policy: Metrics must aggregate errors across all valid target entries globally; do not compute an unweighted mean of window-level scores.
